title: fix-first: refresh release manifest after cnt-3 render drift
action: Baseline repair: commit 80046f4 (cnt-3) updated templates/lib + rendered plugin trees but did not refresh the release manifest; release_manifest --check FAILs (0 missing, 0 added, 26 changed) and test_plugin_distribution sha-match check is red. Run node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then prove --check green and test_plugin_distribution green. Commit ONLY docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json with the cell id in the message. PROHIBITION: do not stage or commit scripts/canary_codex.mjs or any other dirty/untracked path — another session is mid-cnt-5 in this same checkout; use git add with the single explicit path, never git add -A/.

trace.outcome: Regenerated docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json via release_manifest.mjs --write to reconcile 26 files changed by cnt-3's template/lib render drift; --check and test_plugin_distribution now green.
trace.verify_output: release_manifest --check: 362 file(s) match stored manifest; plugin_distribution: 40 passed, 0 failed
